summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptonAI News Page (/news) including all new features: section tabs, category filters, impact filters, flash news, trending news, and news modal. All backend APIs (13 tests) and frontend features pass successfully.

issues: Several data-testid attributes missing for test automation: search input, section tabs, category filters, impact filters, load more button
Flash news banner not visible (may depend on data availability)

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to news components for better test automation (optional improvement)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality: news.tsx is 1005 lines - within acceptable range but consider extracting some components
The data-testid attributes defined in the code (lines 372, 409, 433, 505, 525, 547, etc.) appear to not be rendering properly in React Native Web - may be a platform-specific issue
test_credentials: None required - /news page is publicly accessible
seed_data_creation: None - using live NewsData.io API and mock trending/flash data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All news page features working: section tabs (Dernières/Tendances/Sauvegardés), category filters (Tout/Macro/Institutionnel/Tech/Régulation/Sécurité/Adoption/Analyse), impact filters (Tous/Haussier/Baissier/Neutre), news modal with impact_reason explanation. Flash news and trending are MOCKED data (static backend responses). Main /api/news uses real NewsData.io API.

tests_performed.description: Page loads with 'Actualités Crypto' header and article count
Search input with placeholder 'Rechercher une actualité...' visible
All three tabs clickable and switch content correctly
8 category filters working: Tout, Macro, Institutionnel, Tech, Régulation, Sécurité, Adoption, Analyse
Featured news cards with images, titles, impact badges
Each news card shows category badge, impact reason badge (e.g., 'Hausse des prix', 'Signal d'achat')
Clicking news opens modal with full article details
Modal shows 'Pourquoi c'est haussier ? Hausse des prix' explanation
Bookmark and Share icons in modal header
Actualités tab highlighted in bottom navigation bar
Returns news with categories, impact, impact_reason. Live NewsData.io integration
Returns trending news with views and trending_score (MOCKED)
Returns flash news alerts with type, impact, icon (MOCKED)

mocked_apis_note: /api/news/trending and /api/news/flash return static mock data. /api/news uses real NewsData.io API.
